title: Judea Pearl: From Engineering To Artificial Intelligence
excerpts:
Section Title: Judea Pearl: From Engineering To Artificial Intelligence > Key Dates
Content:
[**1982** ###### Going Back to Bayes Judea Pearl publishes "Reverend Bayes on Inference Engines: A Distributed Hierarchical Approach", a paper that begins the probabilistic revolution in AI.](http://timeline.historyofdatascience.com/?event_id=1982_538_0)
[**2002** ###### The Daniel Pearl Foundation On their son’s death, Judea and his wife Ruth set up the Daniel Pearl Foundation to promote “mutual respect and understanding among diverse cultures through journalism, music and dialogue.”](http://timeline.historyofdatascience.com/?event_id=2002_538_1)
[**2011** ###### Pearl wins The Turing Award Judea Pearl earns the Turing Award from the Association for Computing Machinery (ACM) for his contribution to Artificial Intelligence through calculus for probabilistic and causal reasoning.](http://timeline.historyofdatascience.com/?event_id=2011_538_2)

title: Causal inference in statistics: An overview
excerpts:
Statistics Surveys
Vol. 3 (2009) 96–146
ISSN: 1935-7516
DOI: 10.1214/09-SS057
Causal inference in statistics:
An overview <sup>∗†‡</sup>
Judea Pearl
Computer Science Department
University of California, Los Angeles, CA 90095 USA
e-mail: judea@cs.ucla.edu
Abstract: This review presents empirical researchers with recent advances
in causal inference, and stresses the paradigmatic shifts that must be un-
dertaken in moving from traditional statistical analysis to causal analysis of
multivariate data. Special emphasis is placed on the assumptions that un-
derly all causal inferences, the languages used in formulating those assump-
tions, the conditional nature of all causal and counterfactual claims, and
the methods that have been developed for the assessment of such claims.
These advances are illustrated using a general theory of causation based
on the Structural Causal Model (SCM) described in Pearl ( 2000a ), which
subsumes and unifies other approaches to causation, and provides a coher-

Judea Pearl (Hebrew: [יהודה פרל](https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/58116054._________ "יהודה פרל") ) is an Israeli-American computer scientist and philosopher, best known for championing the probabilistic approach to artificial intelligence and the development of Bayesian networks.
